name: Logility
description: Logility is an AI-powered supply chain planning platform providing solutions for demand sensing, inventory optimization, supply planning, S&OP process management, and supply chain analytics. Part of Aptean, Logility serves 600+ clients across 80 countries with capabilities for demand planning, inventory optimization, scenario planning, manufacturing execution, and supplier management across 12+ industry verticals.

itemListElement.name: Demand Planning
itemListElement.description: AI-powered demand sensing and forecasting to improve forecast accuracy and reduce inventory costs.

itemListElement.name: Inventory Optimization
itemListElement.description: Multi-echelon inventory optimization to balance service levels against working capital requirements.

itemListElement.name: Supply Planning
itemListElement.description: Integrated supply planning with scenario analysis and constrained supply allocation.

itemListElement.name: S&OP Process Management
itemListElement.description: AI-driven Sales and Operations Planning for improved organizational alignment and decision-making.

itemListElement.name: Supply Chain Analytics
itemListElement.description: Advanced analytics and reporting for end-to-end supply chain visibility and performance management.
